title: tectaria griffithii
intro: Tectaria griffithii, also known as Griffith's fern or Griffith's tectaria, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tectaria griffithii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Tectaria griffithii include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
